title: Advanced MLOps Pipeline Implementation
description: Learn to build automated CI/CD/CT pipelines for machine learning models using MLflow and Kubernetes.

title: Zero-Downtime Database Migration
description: Master the art of migrating legacy SQL databases to Google Cloud Spanner without any downtime using Datastream.

title: Generative AI Enterprise Strategy
description: Strategic planning for deploying LLMs and RAG architectures securely within enterprise environments.

title: Databricks & Airflow DataOps
description: Build resilient data lakehouses and orchestrate complex ETL pipelines with Apache Airflow.

title: Multi-Cloud Azure to GCP Refactoring
description: Hands-on training on shifting workloads from Azure to GCP, mapping identity, and optimizing costs.
